channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Moonshot AI launches 2.8T parameter Kimi K3 model
item.description: The model beats Claude Opus 4.8 at Sonnet-level pricing.
item.content:encoded:
The model beats Claude Opus 4.8 at Sonnet-level pricing.

Original source: http://Kimi.com

  • Replies: 2,538
  • Posts: 167

item.title: X uses Grok to purge 4,000 engagement-farming accounts
item.description: Duplicate post revenue now redirects back to original creators.
item.content:encoded:
Duplicate post revenue now redirects back to original creators.

Original source: https://x.com/nikitabier

item.title: Schema agent harness achieves 95% on ARC-AGI-3 using GPT-5.6
item.description: The system builds symbolic world models on-the-fly using program synthesis.
item.content:encoded:
The system builds symbolic world models on-the-fly using program synthesis.

Original source: https://x.com/HavenFeng

item.title: Meta releases Muse Spark 1.1 model on OpenRouter for US developers
item.description: The multimodal model features a one-million-token context window.
item.content:encoded:
The multimodal model features a one-million-token context window.

item.title: Sunday Robotics co-founder releases ACT-2 Preview robotics model
item.description: The model achieved a 99% zero-shot success rate in unseen homes.
item.content:encoded:
The model achieved a 99% zero-shot success rate in unseen homes.

Original source: https://x.com/tonyzzhao/status/2077806003308179802/video/1

item.title: GPT-5.6 disproves 20-year-old Benjamini-Hochberg statistical conjecture
item.description: The model constructed a counterexample demonstrating FDR control failure.
item.content:encoded:
The model constructed a counterexample demonstrating FDR control failure.

Original source: https://web.stanford.edu/~lindrew/stats300C.pdf

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/cgrxwswx

  • Views: 207,244

  • Replies: 69
  • Posts: 5

item.title: Fireworks AI raises Series D at $17.5B valuation with $1B ARR
item.description: Over 95 percent of its 40 trillion daily tokens run on fine-tuned models.
item.content:encoded:
Over 95 percent of its 40 trillion daily tokens run on fine-tuned models.

Original source: https://fireworks.ai/blog/series-d-announcement

item.title: Saronic Technologies plans $3 billion autonomous shipyard in Texas
item.description: The company rejected a California site due to slower regulatory approvals.
item.content:encoded:
The company rejected a California site due to slower regulatory approvals.

Original source: https://www.sfchronicle.com/bayarea/article/california-forever-shipyard-texas-22347278.php?taid=6a587e4ddd3d1b000105dcb5&utm_campaign=trueanthem%2B3988&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

item.title: Moonshot Kimi-K3 declines unsolved Erdős math problem over hallucination risks
item.description: The model correctly cited established mathematical bounds before refusing the prompt.
item.content:encoded:
The model correctly cited established mathematical bounds before refusing the prompt.

Original source: https://x.com/scaling01

item.title: @signulll claims remote work does not work for early startups
item.description: Tech figures countered that success depends on digital-native team skills.
item.content:encoded:
